summary: Comprehensive testing of PRONOKIF F1 race slider and Grand Prix detail page features. All backend APIs working (58/58 tests passed). Frontend race slider navigation, circuit details display, and session schedules functioning correctly.

issues: Circuit layout image blocked by CORS from Wikipedia - shows placeholder instead (expected per design)

backend_race_apis: GET /api/races/upcoming - Returns 24 races with status, can_predict, is_sprint_weekend
GET /api/races/{race_id}/details - Returns circuit info (name, full_name, length_km, turns, laps)
GET /api/races/{race_id}/details - Returns session schedule (FP1, FP2/SQ, FP3/SPRINT, QUALI, COURSE)
Standard weekend (Australia) has FP1, FP2, FP3, QUALI, COURSE
Sprint weekend (China) has FP1, SQ, SPRINT, QUALI, COURSE (no FP2/FP3)
Session names in French (Essais Libres 1, Qualifications, Course)
All 25 circuit stats verified (Albert Park, Shanghai, Monaco, etc.)
backend_existing: All 44 previous API tests passed (auth, leagues, predictions, avatars, missions, mini-games, leaderboards)
frontend_dashboard: Slider shows race name, circuit, date, countdown timer
Shows 'PRONOS ENREGISTRÉS' for races with existing predictions
Shows 'FAIRE MES PRONOS' for races without predictions
Shows 'MODIFIER' button for editing existing predictions
SPRINT WEEKEND badge visible on sprint races
frontend_grandprix_detail: Navigating via 'Voir les détails du circuit' works
Circuit stats displayed (length km, turns, laps)
Session schedule displayed with French session names
Session times in French timezone (heure FR)
SPRINT badge visible on sprint weekends
Circuit layout images load for most circuits (Suzuka verified)
frontend_predictions: FAIRE MES PRONOS navigates to predictions page
MODIFIER navigates to predictions page for existing predictions
Sprint weekend shows additional SPRINT Q and SPRINT R steps

features_verified.race_slider: Working - Shows 8 upcoming races with countdown timers and navigation
features_verified.slider_navigation: Working - Prev/Next buttons and dot navigation functional
features_verified.race_details_api: Working - Returns circuit info and session schedule
features_verified.circuit_info: Working - Shows length (km), turns, and laps for all circuits
features_verified.session_schedule: Working - Shows FP1/FP2/FP3/QUALI/COURSE for standard, FP1/SQ/SPRINT/QUALI/COURSE for sprint
features_verified.french_localization: Working - Session names and times in French
features_verified.predictions_button: Working - FAIRE MES PRONOS from slider and detail page

success_rate.backend: 100% (58/58 passed - 44 original + 14 new race details tests)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All slider, detail page, and predictions features working

seed_data_creation: Used existing test user with existing predictions for Japan 2026
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new race slider and Grand Prix detail page features are fully functional. Test user has predictions for japan-2026 so sees 'PRONOS ENREGISTRÉS' and 'MODIFIER' button. For races without predictions (e.g., miami-2026), shows 'FAIRE MES PRONOS'. The backend has 22 drivers (with Cadillac 11th team entry). Sprint weekends correctly show SQ and SPRINT sessions instead of FP2/FP3. Circuit layout images from Wikipedia may be blocked by CORS on some circuits - placeholder displayed in that case.

new_endpoints: GET /api/races/upcoming - List all races with status and can_predict flag
